title: Celiac Disease
subtitle: Understanding celiac disease and the gluten-free diet
description: Clear, evidence-based information about celiac disease — the gluten-free diet, hidden sources of gluten, nutritional monitoring, and family screening. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.
